records.question: Which joint venture operating companies with 40.0 group equity shareholding that focus on Catering services have flights at exactly 3650.0 altitude and at least 240.0 velocity connected to airports in Amsterdam, Netherlands?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id FROM operate_company
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id
JOIN airport ON flight.airport_id = airport.id
WHERE operate_company.type = 'Joint Venture' AND operate_company.group_equity_shareholding = 40.0 AND airport.city = 'Amsterdam' AND flight.velocity >= 240.0 AND operate_company.principal_activities = 'Catering services' AND airport.country = 'Netherlands' AND flight.altitude = 3650.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id 
FROM operate_company 
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id 
JOIN airport ON flight.airport_id = airport.id 
WHERE operate_company.Group_Equity_Shareholding = 40.0 
AND operate_company.Principal_activities LIKE '%Catering%' 
AND flight.Altitude = 3650.0 
AND flight.Velocity >= 240.0 
AND airport.City = 'Amsterdam' 
AND airport.Country = 'Netherlands'

records.question: Which companies named Dragonair that are incorporated in Hong Kong as subsidiaries have flights with vehicle flight number M2-F1 #13 flying at an altitude of at least 3650.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id FROM operate_company
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id
WHERE flight.vehicle_flight_number = 'M2-F1 #13' AND flight.altitude >= 3650.0 AND operate_company.name = 'Dragonair' AND operate_company.type = 'Subsidiary' AND operate_company.incorporated_in = 'Hong Kong'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id 
FROM operate_company 
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id 
WHERE operate_company.name = 'Dragonair' 
AND operate_company.Incorporated_in = 'Hong Kong' 
AND flight.Vehicle_Flight_number = 'M2-F1 #13' 
AND flight.Altitude >= 3650.0

records.question: Which subsidiaries incorporated in Hong Kong operate as Cargo airlines that had flights in 1963 with vehicle flight number M2-F1 #14 traveling at exactly 240.0 velocity?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id FROM operate_company
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id
WHERE operate_company.incorporated_in = 'Hong Kong' AND flight.vehicle_flight_number = 'M2-F1 #14' AND flight.velocity = 240.0 AND operate_company.principal_activities = 'Cargo airline' AND operate_company.type = 'Subsidiary' AND flight.date LIKE '%1963%'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT operate_company.id 
FROM operate_company 
JOIN flight ON operate_company.id = flight.company_id 
WHERE operate_company.Incorporated_in = 'Hong Kong' 
AND operate_company.Type = 'Cargo' 
AND flight.Date LIKE '1963%' 
AND flight.Vehicle_Flight_number = 'M2-F1 #14' 
AND flight.Velocity = 240.0
